positive: A symmetrical, intricate forest biome composition featuring glowing bioluminescent flora, floating crystalline structures, and elegant, interwoven root patterns. The style should be modern mystical vector art combined with linocut etching aesthetics. Strong emphasis on clean silhouettes, high contrast, and intricate details. Use a rich jewel-tone color palette (deep sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) set against a muted, creamy off-white background for maximum print pop. The composition must be centered and designed to be visually striking when printed large on fabric, resembling a detailed mandala or crest.
negative: blur, watermark, text, logo, signature, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, cartoonish, messy, graffiti, sci-fi, photorealistic
